---
title: "Poster"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div style="text-align:center; padding:5rem 2rem; color:#888;">
  <div style="font-size:3rem; margin-bottom:1rem;">📋</div>
  <h2 style="color:#555;">Coming Soon</h2>
  <p>The project poster (ISO A1, 300 dpi, JPEG) will be published here after completion.</p>
  <p style="font-size:0.9rem; color:#aaa;">Due: 1 July 2026</p>
</div>
```
